about.title: Know About Me
about.description: I'm Ludwind, a Software Engineer passionate about building innovative tech solutions. I focus on developing high-quality products that solve real problems and deliver value. Always learning, always creating.

whyHireMe.title: Why Hire Me
whyHireMe.description: I'm a Software Engineering graduate with proven fullstack experience. My academic training gave me solid foundations in software architecture, database design, and development best practices. I currently work with Java in enterprise environments, while my specialty in Laravel/Livewire allows me to build robust and efficient backends. I complement my profile with React for modern and dynamic frontends. + Fluent English = barrier-free communication for international projects.

problemSolving.name: Problem-Solving
problemSolving.description: I enjoy tackling complex challenges and continuously improving my skills, whether through coding challenges or working on my personal projects.

teamwork.name: Teamwork
teamwork.description: I have worked with interdisciplinary teams, contributing to system integration and maintenance while ensuring smooth communication and efficient workflows.

selfLearning.name: Self-Learning
selfLearning.description: I consider myself a self-learner who thrives on acquiring new knowledge. Learning Spring Boot, React.tsx, Java, and Python has taught me to adapt quickly and stay up to date with the latest technologies.

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.description: I stay committed to my goals, push through obstacles, and keep moving forward whether in coding, learning, or personal growth.

organization.name: Project Organization
organization.description: I worked leading a team of five in developing a scheduling system has taught me how to plan, prioritize tasks, and coordinate effectively to meet deadlines.

creativity.name: Creativity
creativity.description: I enjoy thinking outside the box, turning ideas into functional solutions, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible.
